channel.title: fortran on Rohit Goswami
channel.description: Recent content in fortran on Rohit Goswami

item.title: Fortran, GSoC21 and Me
item.description: Reminisces and prophecies brought upon by LFortran and GSoC 2021 Background I know not what the language of the future will look like, but I know it will be called FORTRAN… — Charles Anthony Richard Hoare, circa 1982 – Daan Frenkel, 2020 This post is a little belated, given that the GSoC announcements were a few days ago. Therein lies the future, and much digital ink, sweat and blood shall be spilled towards accomplishing the goals outlined in my accepted project proposal.
